coverage_note: The bundled RYR1 population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from RYR1 sarcoplasmic-reticulum calcium release, excitation-contraction coupling, malignant hyperthermia biology, and myopathy context and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000196218: RYR1 coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: RYR1 findings should be read against sarcoplasmic-reticulum calcium release, excitation-contraction coupling, malignant hyperthermia biology, and myopathy context; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

RYR1 malignant-hyperthermia model is curated as a RYR1 marker for Malignant hyperthermia susceptibility review context, Congenital myopathy context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

RYR1 congenital myopathy model is curated as a RYR1 marker for Malignant hyperthermia susceptibility review context, Congenital myopathy context; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
